title: dupatya denudata
intro: Dupatya denudata is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae and is commonly known as the 'Nepalese sweet orange'. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Dupatya denudata include the treatment of respiratory issues, fever, and digestive problems, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and fruits can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
